subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua(10,16): error TLUA7006: Parameter 'x' implicitly has an 'any' type.
subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua(23,23): error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua(23,37): error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua(23,46): error TLUA7006: Parameter 'v' implicitly has an 'any' type.
subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua(23,55): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.


==== subtypeReductionWithAnyFunctionType.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/849
    
    declare function useMemo<T>(func: () => T): T;
    
    function getPredicate(alwaysTrue: boolean) {
        local predicate: (input: string) => boolean = useMemo(() => {
            if (alwaysTrue) {
                return () => true;
            }
            return x => x.length > 0;
                   ~
!!! error TLUA7006: Parameter 'x' implicitly has an 'any' type.
        });
        return predicate;
    }
    
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/1016
    
    declare function compact<T>(array: T[]): T[];
    declare function makeFooer(): Fooer;
    interface Fooer {
        foo: (v: string) => string;
    }
    function f() {
        local _ = compact([makeFooer(), { foo = (v) => v }]);
                          ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
                                        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
                                                 ~
!!! error TLUA7006: Parameter 'v' implicitly has an 'any' type.
                                                          ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
    }
